Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi Bus K3 Timings MBZ University of Artificial Intelligence to Al Rayyana

June 29, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The public transport system in Abu Dhabi holds the reputation of being very reliable and convenient with easy access, both for residents and visitors of the emirate. The Bus K3 route guide with operational timings, major stops and travel tips so you can travel this route with ease.

Contents

Operational Details

Bus K3 runs its own schedule during the day, giving passengers the opportunity to take the bus whenever they need to. Below is the detailed schedule for Bus K3, departing from both MBZ University of Artificial Intelligence and Al Rayyana:

From MBZ University of Artificial Intelligence From Al Rayyana
06:10 06:15
06:40 06:45
07:10 07:15
07:40 07:45
08:10 08:15
08:40 08:45
09:10 09:15
09:40 09:45
10:10 10:15
10:40 10:45
11:10 11:15
11:40 11:45
12:10 12:15
12:40 12:45
13:10 13:15
13:40 13:45
14:10 14:15
14:40 14:45
15:10 15:15
15:40 15:45
16:10 16:15
16:40 16:45
17:10 17:15
17:40 17:45
18:10 18:15
18:40 18:45
19:10 19:15
19:40 19:45
20:10 20:15
20:40 20:45
21:10 21:15
21:40 21:45
22:10 22:15
22:40 22:45

Download PDF Bus K3

Bus K3 TimetableYou can check complete timings on official AD Mobility website or visit this link K3 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Payment is made using the Hafilat Card at standard fares of AED 2 per journey within a single zone and extra fares for longer distances. Cards can be recharged at kiosks or online, for added convenience.

Route Overview

Bus K3 serves a variety of important stops, providing access to essential services and prominent landmarks in Abu Dhabi:

  1. MBZ University of Artificial Intelligence: Starting point near the university.

  2. MASDAR Eco Residences: A residential area focusing on sustainable living.

  3. Al Mahra Residences: Another key residential area.

  4. My City Centre Mall: Shopping and dining hub.

  5. IRENA HQ: Headquarters of the International Renewable Energy Agency.

  6. Khazna Data Centre: A major data facility.

  7. Al Ibda Street: Access to residential areas.

  8. Al Bandar Street: Popular residential and business area.

  9. Stop 16174: Connecting various sectors of the city.

  10. Al Sutouh Street: Major city artery.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Nadheem Street: Residential neighborhood access.

  2. Al A-ilah St: Commercial and residential mix.

  3. Al Rashid Street: Key road with various services.

  4. Sas Al Nakhl School: Educational facility.

  5. Khalifa City, Souq: A lively market area and residential hub.

  6. Civil Defense: Emergency services access.

  7. Zakhir Street: Residential and commercial areas.

  8. Al Marmouq Street: Vital street connecting residential districts.

  9. Al Narjis Street: Access to residential neighborhoods.

  10. Al Rayyana: Final destination, a prominent residential area.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Some notable attractions along the K3 route include:

  1. My City Centre Mall: A popular shopping and dining destination.

  2. MASDAR Eco Residences: A model for sustainable urban living.

  3. IRENA HQ: A key institution for renewable energy initiatives.

  4. Khalifa City, Souq: A bustling market area with local goods.

Journey Experience

Bus K3 is a scenic and informative ride through some of Abu Dhabi’s most famous areas. The route starts from MBZ University of Artificial Intelligence and goes through the green spaces before it passes by MASDAR Eco Residences and IRENA HQ.

When the bus goes towards Khalifa City, Souq, you will get to see people enjoying local markets and residential neighborhoods. The K3 route stops at several places near educational institutions, shopping centres and commercial hubs, giving passengers a brief idea of the dynamic and multi faceted life in Abu Dhabi. The trip offers easy access to a lot of key areas for work and play.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: June 29, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej

Al Khaleej is the lead editor at Dubai Time — covering UAE transport, banking, visa services, and city guides. Trusted by residents and expats across the Emirates for accurate, up-to-date local information.
